title: Help with surveys | Stats NZ
content:
Stats NZ surveys people, households, and businesses so we can produce statistics about New Zealand.
Find out why you need to take part, what's involved, what we do with your information, and how to get more help.

## Contact us for survey help
Get in touch if you have questions or complaints about a survey we've asked you to complete.

## Privacy, security, and confidentiality of survey data
Learn how we look after your information.

## List of Stats NZ surveys
Find information about the survey you have been selected for.

## Individual and household survey information
Includes why you or your household were selected, how to identify a Stats NZ survey interviewer, and what to expect when you take part.

## Business survey information
Includes why your business was selected, and how you can use the statistics we produce to benefit your business.

## Stats NZ survey charter
Sets out how we will work with you if you’re required to participate in one of our surveys.

## Help us improve the survey experience
We're improving the experience for everyone who completes a Stats NZ survey, and invite you to participate in a workshop to help us.
